sections.paragraph:
f. only in pl.-

(1) going, progress, Nah 2:6 specially solemn processions of God, Psal. 68:25 .

(2) ways, Hab 3:6, הֲלִיכֹות עֹולָם לֹו “ancient ways are to him,” i.e. God goes in the ways in which he anciently went. Trop. way of acting, Pro 31:27, הֲלִיכֹות בֵּיהָהּ “(she attends to) the ways of her house,” i.e. her domestic concerns.

(3) companies of travellers, Job 6:19. Root הָלַךְ.
